branding.tagline: Your CRA compliance platform — from day one and beyond.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in to your Seentrix account

signup.title: Create an account
signup.checkInboxBody: We've sent you an email. Open it to confirm your address and finish setting up your Seentrix account. If you already had an account with us, the email will help you sign back in.

onboarding.title: Set up your company
onboarding.description: Add a profile picture and create your organization.

step1.description: Give your organization a name and an optional avatar. You can change this later.

step2.description: Legal identity — required on every Declaration of Conformity and Technical File.

step3.description: Who signs documents on behalf of your company, and how to reach you.

welcome.title: Welcome to Seentrix
welcome.subtitle: You're all set up. Here's how Seentrix helps you achieve CRA compliance:
welcome.bullet1Description: Determine which CRA category and conformity route applies to each of your products.
welcome.bullet2Description: Work through the CRA requirements with a guided checklist — we track your progress automatically.
welcome.bullet3Description: Upload SBOMs, scan for vulnerabilities, and stay on top of your security posture.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists with that email, you'll receive a password reset link shortly.

changePassword.title: Set a new password
changePassword.description: Your account was created by an administrator. Please choose a personal password to continue.

fields.legalNameHint: The registered company name exactly as it appears on your incorporation documents.
fields.registrationNumberHint: Trade register (HRB), VAT ID, or equivalent national business registration.
fields.entityTypeHint: Manufacturers sign Declarations of Conformity. Importers/distributors have verification duties.
fields.signatoryNameHint: The natural person who signs the EU Declaration of Conformity.
fields.signatoryPositionHint: Job title that appears next to their signature (CEO, Compliance Officer, …).
fields.contactEmailHint: Public customer-facing contact. Will appear on technical documentation and product labels.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.notAuthenticated: You must be signed in to continue.
errors.alreadyOnboarded: Your account is already set up.
errors.passwordTooWeak: Password is too weak. Try a longer or more complex password.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.resetExpired: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.urlInvalid: Please enter a valid URL (including https://).
